title: Path Constants

changes: Added N5_CORE_DB as unified database path
Added LEGACY_DEALS_DB, LEGACY_CRM_V3_DB, LEGACY_CRM_DB for migration reference
Added DEALS_DB and CRM_V3_DB as backward compatibility aliases pointing to N5_CORE_DB
Updated CRM_DB to point to N5_CORE_DB with deprecation comment
Updated CRM_DB to point to N5_CORE_DB
Added DEALS_DB alias for deals access
Preserved CRM_INDIVIDUALS, CRM_ORGANIZATIONS for markdown profiles
Added legacy path constants for migration reference
Created as new canonical import for unified database access
Implemented get_db_connection() with FK enforcement and readonly option
Added table name constants: PEOPLE_TABLE, ORGANIZATIONS_TABLE, DEALS_TABLE, DEAL_ROLES_TABLE, INTERACTIONS_TABLE, CALENDAR_EVENTS_TABLE
Included legacy path references for migration scripts

verification.paths_py_imports: PASS - N5_CORE_DB, LEGACY_DEALS_DB, aliases all resolve correctly
verification.crm_paths_py: PASS - CRM_DB points to n5_core.db, markdown paths preserved

notes_for_orchestrator: All path constants updated successfully. Wave 2 scripts can now import from db_paths.py for unified access. The backward compatibility aliases (DEALS_DB, CRM_V3_DB) in paths.py will allow existing scripts to continue working until they're explicitly migrated.
